ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3

P : Measure Ω

inst✝⁶ : OrderBot ι
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
X : ι → Ω → E
inst✝⁵ : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝⁴ : OrderTopology ι
inst✝³ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝² : 𝓕.HasUsualConditions P
inst✝¹ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝ : CompleteSpace E
hX :
  @ProbabilityTheory.Locally ι Ω E mΩ inst✝⁷ inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴
    SubtractionMonoid.toSubNegZeroMonoid.toNegZeroClass.toZero
    (fun X => ∀ (ω : Ω) (x : ι), ∃ l, Tendsto (fun x => X x ω) (nhdsWithin x (Set.Iio x)) (nhds l)) 𝓕 X P
⊢ ∀ᵐ (ω : Ω) ∂P, ∀ (x : ι), ∃ l, Tendsto (fun x => X x ω) (nhdsWithin x (Set.Iio x)) (nhds l)

          exact (not_lt_bot this))) (le_rfl))]

      simpa using (show (τ n ω) ≠ ⊥ from by

        have : (x : WithTop ι) < (⊥ : WithTop ι) := by simpa [hbot] using hn
        exact (not_lt_bot this))), lt_of_lt_of_le (bot_lt_iff_ne_bot.2 (by

  rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hτX⟩

    simpa [hstop] using h.choose_spec)

      ∀ n, ∀ ω, ∀ x, ∃ l,
        Tendsto (fun t => stoppedProcess (fun i => {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n) t ω)
          (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
    intro n
    simpa using hτX n
  filter_upwards [hτ.tendsto_top] with ω hω
  intro x
  have hTop : ∀ i : ι, ∃ n : ℕ, (i : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := by
    have := (WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff.1 hω)
    intro i
    rcases this i with ⟨n, hn⟩
    exact ⟨n, hn n le_rfl⟩
  rcases hTop x with ⟨n, hn⟩
  rcases hτX' n ω x with ⟨l, hl⟩
  refine ⟨l, ?_⟩
  have hle : (x : WithTop ι) ≤ τ n ω := le_of_lt hn
  have hx :
      (fun t => stoppedProcess (fun i => {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n) t ω) =
        fun t => X t ω := by
    funext t
    simp [stoppedProcess, hle, Set.indicator_of_mem, WithTop.bot_lt_coe]
  simpa [hx] using hl

classical
  obtain ⟨τ, hτ, hp⟩ := hX
  filter_upwards [hτ.tendsto_top] with ω hω
  intro x
  have hx : ⊥ < τ 0 ω := by
    have : (⊥ : WithTop ι) < ⊤ := bot_lt_top
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le this <| (WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff.1 hω) ⊥ 0 (by simp)
  specialize hp 0 ω x
  rcases hp with ⟨l, hl⟩
  refine ⟨l, ?_⟩
  simpa [stoppedProcess, hx, Set.indicator_of_mem] using hl

classical
  rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hτX⟩
  have hτtop : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∀ x : ι, ∃ n, x < τ n ω := by
    filter_upwards [hτ.tendsto_top] with ω hω x
    have hx := (WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff.1 hω) x
    rcases hx with ⟨n, hn⟩
    refine ⟨n, ?_⟩
    have : (x : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := by
      have := hn n le_rfl
      simpa using this
    simpa using this
  filter_upwards [hτtop] with ω hω x
  rcases hω x with ⟨n, hxn⟩
  have hxmem : ω ∈ {ω | (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω} := by
    have : (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := lt_trans (by simpa using (WithTop.bot_lt_coe x)) (by simpa using hxn)
    simpa [Set.mem_setOf_eq] using this
  have hxle : (x : WithTop ι) ≤ τ n ω := by
    exact le_of_lt (by simpa using hxn)
  have hst := hτX n ω x
  refine ⟨_, ?_⟩
  simpa [stoppedProcess, hxle, Set.indicator_of_mem hxmem] using hst

classical
  rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hτX⟩
  have htop : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∀ x, ∃ n, x < τ n ω := by
    filter_upwards [hτ.tendsto_top] with ω hω
    intro x
    have hω' := (WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff.1 hω) x
    rcases hω' with ⟨n, hn⟩
    exact ⟨n, hn n le_rfl⟩
  filter_upwards [htop] with ω hω x
  rcases hω x with ⟨n, hn⟩
  specialize hτX n ω x
  refine ⟨hτX.choose, ?_⟩
  have hx : x ≤ τ n ω := le_of_lt hn
  have hx' : (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := lt_of_lt_of_le (bot_lt_coe x) hx
  simpa [stoppedProcess, hx, hx', Set.indicator_of_mem, Pi.mul_apply] using hτX.choose_spec

classical
  rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hτX⟩
  have hmem : ∀ n, ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ω ∈ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω} := fun n ↦ by
    have htop : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Tendsto (τ · ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := hτ.tendsto_top
    filter_upwards [htop] with ω hω
    have : ∀ᶠ k in atTop, (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ k ω := by
      simpa [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] using (hω.eventually (a := (⊥ : WithTop ι)) fun _ ↦ id)
    exact this 0 (by simp)
  have hprop : ∀ n, ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto (X · ω) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := fun n ↦ by
    have : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∀ x, ∃ l,
        Tendsto (fun t => stoppedProcess (fun i => {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n) t ω)
          (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) :=
      by
        simpa [Locally] using (ae_of_all _ (hτX n))
    filter_upwards [this, hmem n] with ω hω hx x
    specialize hω x
    rcases hω with ⟨l, hl⟩
    refine ⟨l, ?_⟩
    have hEq : (fun t => stoppedProcess (fun i => {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n) t ω)
        = fun t => X t ω := by
      funext t
      have : (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := hx
      simp [stoppedProcess, this]
    simpa [hEq] using hl
  have hprop' : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∀ n, ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto (X · ω) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
    exact ae_all_iff.2 (fun n ↦ hprop n)
  filter_upwards [hprop'] with ω hω x
  exact hω 0 x

rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hXτ⟩
  have hXτ' : ∀ n, ∀ ω x, ∃ l, Tendsto ((stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n)) · ω)
      (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := fun n ↦ hXτ n
  filter_upwards [hτ.tendsto_top] with ω hω
  intro x
  have hTop : Tendsto (τ · ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := hω
  rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hTop
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := hTop x
  specialize hn n le_rfl
  have hmem : ⊥ < τ n ω := by
    have hx : (x : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := hn
    exact bot_lt_iff_ne_bot.2 (by
      intro hbot
      simp [hbot] at hx)
  rcases hXτ' n ω x with ⟨l, hl⟩
  refine ⟨l, ?_⟩
  have hEq : (fun t => X t ω) = fun t =>
      (stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n)) t ω := by
    funext t
    have ht : (t : WithTop ι) ≤ τ n ω := le_trans (le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le (show t < x from ?_) hn)) le_rfl
    · have : (t : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := lt_of_lt_of_le (show (t : WithTop ι) < x from ?_) (le_of_lt hn)
      simp [stoppedProcess, this.ne', Set.indicator_of_mem, hmem]
    · exact False.elim (by
        have : t < x := by
          simpa [nhdsWithin, Set.mem_Iio] using (show t ∈ Set.Iio x from by trivial)
        exact this)
  simpa [hEq] using hl

classical
  refine (hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top).mono ?_
  intro ω hω x
  by_cases hx : ∃ n, ⊥ < hX.localSeq n ω
  · rcases hx with ⟨n, hn⟩
    have hprop := hX.stoppedProcess n ω x
    have hle : (hX.localSeq n ω : WithTop ι) ≤ x := by
      by_contra hlt
      have : Tendsto (hX.localSeq · ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := hω
      have hEvent : ∀ᶠ m in atTop, hX.localSeq m ω > x := by
        simpa [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] using (this (x : WithTop ι))
      have hn' : ∀ᶠ m in atTop, hX.localSeq m ω ≥ hX.localSeq n ω := by
        have hmono := (hX.IsLocalizingSequence.mono).eventually
        have hmonoω : Monotone (hX.localSeq · ω) := by
          exact (hmono).self_of_nhds (by rfl)
        exact (eventually_ge_atTop n).mono (fun m hm => hmonoω hm)
      have : ∀ᶠ m in atTop, (hX.localSeq n ω : WithTop ι) < hX.localSeq m ω := by
        filter_upwards [hEvent, hn'] with m hmx hmn
        exact lt_of_lt_of_le (show (x : WithTop ι) < hX.localSeq m ω by exact hmx) hmn
      have : (hX.localSeq n ω : WithTop ι) < ⊤ :=
        lt_of_lt_of_le (this.self_of_nhds (by rfl)) le_top
      exact not_le_of_lt this (le_top)
    have hstopped_eq :
        (fun t => stoppedProcess (fun i => {ω | ⊥ < hX.localSeq n ω}.indicator (X i)) (hX.localSeq n) t ω)
          = fun t => X t ω := by
      funext t
      have : t ≤ hX.localSeq n ω := le_trans le_rfl (by exact le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le hn hle))
      simp [stoppedProcess, this, Set.indicator_of_mem, hn]
    refine ⟨_, ?_⟩
    simpa [hstopped_eq] using hprop
  · have : Tendsto (hX.localSeq · ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := hω
    have hneg : ∀ n, ¬ (⊥ : WithTop ι) < hX.localSeq n ω := by
      intro n hn
      exact hx ⟨n, hn⟩
    have : Tendsto (hX.localSeq · ω) atTop (𝓝 (⊥ : WithTop ι)) := by
      refine tendsto_principal.2 ?_
      simp [Filter.eventually_atTop, hneg]
    have : (⊤ : WithTop ι) = (⊥ : WithTop ι) := by
      exact tendsto_nhds_unique this hω
    cases this

classical
  rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hτX⟩
  have htop : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Tendsto (τ · ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := hτ.tendsto_top
  filter_upwards [htop] with ω hω
  intro x
  have hx : ∃ n, (x : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := by
    have : (x : WithTop ι) ∈ 𝓝 (⊤ : WithTop ι) := by
      simpa using (IsTopologicalBasis.mem_nhds_iff.mp (by rfl) ?_) 
    ·
      simpa [WithTop.mem_nhds_top] using (WithTop.mem_nhds_top (a := x))
    ·
      intro y hy
      exact hy
  rcases (WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff.1 hω x) with ⟨n, hn⟩
  refine (hτX n ω x).imp ?_
  intro l hl
  have hEq : (fun t => stoppedProcess (fun i => {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n) t ω) = X · ω := by
    funext t
    have ht : (t : WithTop ι) ≤ τ n ω := by
      exact le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le (by exact WithTop.coe_lt_coe.2 (le_of_lt (hn n le_rfl))) (le_rfl))
    simp [stoppedProcess, ht, Set.indicator_of_mem, lt_of_lt_of_le (WithTop.bot_lt_coe x) (le_of_lt (hn n le_rfl))]
  simpa [hEq] using hl
simpa [Locally] using (hX.stoppedProcess 0)

classical
  rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hτX⟩
  have hpos : ∀ n, {ω | (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω} = {ω | τ n ω ≠ ⊥} := by
    intro n; ext ω; simp
  have hunion : (⋃ n : ℕ, {ω | (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω}) = {ω | Tendsto (τ · ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤)} := by
    ext ω
    constructor
    · intro hω
      rcases Set.mem_iUnion.1 hω with ⟨n, hn⟩
      have : (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := hn
      have ht : Tendsto (τ · ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := by
        have : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Tendsto (τ · ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := hτ.tendsto_top
        exact (by classical exact (this.self_of_nhdsWithin ?_))?_
      exact ht
    · intro hω
      have hne : ∀ᶠ n in atTop, τ n ω ≠ (⊥ : WithTop ι) := by
        have : ∀ᶠ n in atTop, (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := by
          simpa [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] using (hω (⊥ : ι))
        exact this
      rcases (eventually_atTop.1 hne) with ⟨n, hn⟩
      exact Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨n, by simpa using hn n le_rfl⟩
  have hcover : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∃ n, (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := by
    have ht : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Tendsto (τ · ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := hτ.tendsto_top
    filter_upwards [ht] with ω hω
    have : ∃ n, (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := by
      have h' : ∀ᶠ n in atTop, (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := by
        simpa [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] using (hω (⊥ : ι))
      rcases (eventually_atTop.1 h') with ⟨n, hn⟩
      refine ⟨n, ?_⟩
      simpa using hn n le_rfl
    exact this
  have hAE : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto (X · ω) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
    filter_upwards [hcover] with ω hω
    rcases hω with ⟨n, hn⟩
    have hprop := hτX n ω
    have : (fun i ↦ {ω | (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω}.indicator (X i ω)) = fun i ↦ X i ω := by
      funext i
      simp [Set.indicator_of_mem, hn]
    have hstop :
        (stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n)) · ω
          = stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω}.indicator (X i ω)) (τ n ω) := by
      rfl
    have hlim : ∀ x, ∃ l,
        Tendsto
          (fun x => (stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n)) x ω)
          (nhdsWithin x (Set.Iio x)) (nhds l) := hprop
    intro x
    rcases hlim x with ⟨l, hl⟩
    refine ⟨l, ?_⟩
    have hEq :
        (fun x => (stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n)) x ω)
          = fun x => X x ω := by
      funext i
      have hle : (i : ι) ≤ (τ n ω).untopD ⊥ ∨ (τ n ω).untopD ⊥ ≤ i := le_total _ _
      by_cases ht : (↑i : WithTop ι) ≤ τ n ω
      · simp [stoppedProcess, ht, Set.indicator_of_mem, hn]
      · have ht' : τ n ω < (↑i : WithTop ι) := lt_of_not_ge ht
        simp [stoppedProcess, ht, Set.indicator_of_mem, hn]
    simpa [hEq] using hl
  exact hAE

classical
  obtain ⟨τ, hτ, hτX⟩ := hX
  have hτpos : ∀ n, ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ω ∈ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω} := by
    intro n
    filter_upwards [hτ.tendsto_top] with ω hω
    rcases (WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff.1 hω) 0 with ⟨N, hN⟩
    have hlt : (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ (max n N) ω := by
      have : (0 : WithTop ι) < τ (max n N) ω := hN (max n N) (le_max_right _ _)
      simpa using this
    have hmono := (hτ.mono).self_of_nhds
    have hle : τ n ω ≤ τ (max n N) ω := by
      have hωmono : Monotone fun k ↦ τ k ω := hmono ω
      exact hωmono (le_max_left _ _)
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le hlt hle
  have hI :
      ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto (X · ω) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
    filter_upwards [hτ.tendsto_top, (ae_all_iff.2 hτpos)] with ω htop hpos
    intro x
    rcases (WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff.1 htop) x with ⟨N, hN⟩
    have hx : (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ N ω := lt_of_lt_of_le (by simpa using (hpos N))
      (le_of_lt (hN N le_rfl))
    have hEq :
        (stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ N ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ N)) · ω = X · ω := by
      funext i
      by_cases hi : (i : WithTop ι) ≤ τ N ω
      · rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le _ _ hi, Set.indicator_of_mem]
        · rfl
        · exact hx
      · rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_ge _ _ (le_of_not_ge hi), Set.indicator_of_mem]
        · simp
        · exact hx
    rcases hτX N ω x with ⟨l, hl⟩
    refine ⟨l, ?_⟩
    simpa [hEq] using hl
  exact hI

classical
  rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hτX⟩
  have hXτ := hτX 0
  have hτtop : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, τ 0 ω = ⊤ := by
    filter_upwards [hτ.tendsto_top] with ω hω
    have : τ 0 ω ≠ (⊤ : WithTop ι) → False := by
      intro hne
      have hlt : τ 0 ω < ⊤ := lt_top_iff_ne_top.2 hne
      have : Tendsto (τ · ω) atTop (𝓝 (⊤ : WithTop ι)) := hω
      have : Eventually (fun n : ℕ => τ n ω ∈ Ioi (τ 0 ω)) atTop :=
        (tendsto_principal.1 (this.eventually (IsOpen.mem_nhds isOpen_Ioi hlt))).mono
          (by intro n hn; exact hn)
      rcases (this.and (eventually_ge_atTop 0)).exists with ⟨n, hnIoi, hn0⟩
      have hmono := (hτ.mono).eventually
      have hmono' : Monotone (τ · ω) := hmono.self_of_nhds (by rfl)
      have : τ 0 ω ≤ τ n ω := hmono' hn0
      exact (not_lt_of_ge this) hnIoi
    exact top_unique (by
      by_contra hne
      exact this hne)
  have hleft : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∀ x, ∃ l, Tendsto (X · ω) (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 l) := by
    filter_upwards [hτtop] with ω hωtop x
    have hx := hXτ ω x
    refine hx.imp ?_
    intro l hl
    simpa [hωtop, stoppedProcess_const_top] using hl
  exact hleft
